message:
🐛 Use ORG_TOKEN PAT for issue creation to trigger ai-fix workflow (#338)

Events created by GITHUB_TOKEN don't trigger other workflows (GitHub's
infinite-loop prevention). Use ORG_TOKEN PAT instead so the labeled
event fires and the ai-fix workflow assigns Copilot coding agent.
This matches the pattern used by auto-qa on kubestellar/console.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
